$comment: Validation-only starter manifest for the app-intents emit mode (generator/app_intents_generator.py). Exercises 2 intents (searchActors: collection-return via outputPath; getProfile: whole-output single-entity return) and 1 entity (ProfileEntity, reconciling ProfileView + ProfileViewDetailed via two init(from:) overloads, plus a string query backed by searchActors and a byIds query backed by getProfiles). This is NOT the production Catbird manifest — see docs/superpowers/plans for that. Unlike core/overlay manifests, lexicons.reference and swift.output here are resolved relative to THIS file's directory, not the invocation CWD (see app_intents_generator.py module docstring).

intents.title: Search Bluesky Profiles
intents.description: Find Bluesky profiles matching a search query.

intents.title: Get Bluesky Profile
intents.description: Look up a single Bluesky profile by handle or DID.
